name: obsidian-kb-root-symlink
title: Handle root Obsidian KB symlinks safely
description: Prevent the KB refresh helper from following a root .obsidian-kb symlink into an external vault; detect, report, and safely migrate or stop while preserving the target.
creator: sdelmas
notes: Superseded by canonical sd-ai-command-pack PR #212 (https://github.com/platypeeps/sd-ai-command-pack/pull/212), which owns the installed helper and intentionally preserves valid directory symlinks while rejecting unusable roots. Do not implement a conflicting consumer-local copy.
